summary: Frontend testing of 3-column layout templates (News, Drug Guide, Drug Laws). Fixed duplicate JUMP TO SECTION bug in NewsArticlePage. All page templates working correctly with proper TOC extraction and sidebar layouts.

bugs_fixed.issue: Inline 'JUMP TO SECTION' grid was showing even when left sidebar TOC already displayed the same sections (duplicate navigation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3-column layout templates (News, Drug Guide, Drug Laws) are working correctly. The duplicate JUMP TO SECTION bug in NewsArticlePage has been fixed. Cloudflare bot protection may cause intermittent test failures on preview environment but real user experience is not affected.
